name: andreys-helper
description: Worktree controls in the Source Control panel for VSCode and Cursor, driving the worktrunk (wt) CLI headlessly — create and remove git worktrees without touching the terminal.

andreysHelper.closeCursorAgent.markdownDescription: When arranging Claude panes (C1/C2/C3), close Cursor's built-in agent view/tab first so it doesn't compete for editor space.

andreysHelper.closeAgentEditorTabs.markdownDescription: Close Cursor's agent editor tabs when arranging Claude panes. Cursor renders its agent as an editor whose input type isn't exposed by the API; these are closed directly. Claude tabs are webviews and never affected. Requires `#andreysHelper.closeCursorAgent#`.

andreysHelper.closeAuxiliaryBar.markdownDescription: Also close the auxiliary (secondary) side bar when arranging Claude panes — useful if your Cursor build docks the **Agents** panel there instead of as an editor tab. Off by default since it would also hide Claude's own secondary-sidebar view. Requires `#andreysHelper.closeCursorAgent#`.

andreysHelper.cursorAgentViewTypePattern.markdownDescription: Case-insensitive regular expression matched against editor webview `viewType`s to identify Cursor's agent/chat tab for closing. Claude's own tabs are always excluded. Use the **Claude Panes: Inspect Tabs (debug)** command to discover the real viewType.

andreysHelper.cursorAgentCloseCommands.markdownDescription: Additional command IDs to run (if registered) to close Cursor's agent — useful when it's a side panel rather than an editor tab. Discover candidates with **Claude Panes: Inspect Tabs (debug)**.
